turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I had surgery here last week — appendix removal. I wanted to ask about the wound dressing. It looks a little different today.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I hope you're recovering well. Can you tell me your name and procedure date?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Manoj Thakur. Surgery was on the 17th.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Manoj. I'm sorry to hear you're concerned about the wound site. I have to be honest — post-operative care guidance and wound assessment is something I really shouldn't advise on from this line, as it requires a clinical eye.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Is it serious? Should I be worried?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I truly can't say — I wouldn't want to either alarm you or dismiss something important. This is exactly why I want to get you to the right person. Our nursing or surgical team can assess your situation properly. Let me connect you to our staff right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely. Holding the line — let me connect you to our staff immediately.
